report.name: METH_DETAILS
report.comment: 03/25/2007 C. Bogard altered the report layout and fields showing. the program wanted the status added back in the action type and action date added in and the layout more user friendly. 07/16/2007 C. Bogard totally changed the layout of the report. made it more user friendly. 09/18/2007 C. Bogard added the action comments column and changed the action type from action_type_desc to action_type_name 11/23/2007 C.Bogard Added v_org_cur to the select statement twice using different alias names. done this way so that i can filter by owner and contractor.

dataSource.name: Q_1
dataSource.select: SELECT VMH.CVID, VMH.METH_ID, VMH.OWNER, VMH.STAT_TYPE_ID, UPPER(ST.STAT_TYPE_DESC), ST.STAT_TYPE_DESC, AH.STATUS_DATE, AH.ACTION_TYPE_ID, ACT.ACTION_TYPE_DESC, ACT.ACTION_TYPE_NAME, AH.ACTION_HIST_ID, AH.ACTION_HIST_DESCR, VMH.SITE_ID, VMH.SITE_NAME, VMH.INCIDENT_SITE_NAME, C.CNTY_NM, VMH.ADDR_CITY, VMH.LOCATION, VMH.COMPLNT_RECVD_DT, VMH.COMPLNT_OBSERVED_DT, VMH.COMPLNT_REFERRED_DT, M.ORG_ID, VMH.CNTY_ID FROM ACTION_HISTORY AH, ACTION_TYPE ACT, V_METH_HEADER VMH, COUNTIES C, MEMBER M, STATUS_TYPE ST, ORGANIZATION O WHERE AH.ACTION_TYPE_ID = ACT.ACTION_TYPE_ID(+) AND VMH.STAT_TYPE_ID = ST.STAT_TYPE_ID (+) AND VMH.METH_ID = M.METH_ID (+) AND AH.METH_ID(+) = VMH.METH_ID AND O.ORG_ID = VMH.OWNER(+) --AND (M.MEM_ID IS NULL OR (M.MEM_ID IS NOT NULL AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL(M.MEM_START_DATE,TO_DATE('01-JAN-1800', 'DD-MON-YYYY'))) AND --TRUNC(NVL(M.MEM_END_DATE,SYSDATE)))) AND (:PARM_CVID IS NULL OR (:PARM_CVID IS NOT NULL AND VMH.CVID IN (:PARM_CVID))) AND (:PARM_ADDR_CITY IS NULL OR (:PARM_ADDR_CITY IS NOT NULL AND VMH.ADDR_CITY IN (:PARM_ADDR_CITY))) AND (:PARM_CNTY IS NULL OR (:PARM_CNTY IS NOT NULL AND C.CNTY_NM IN (:PARM_CNTY))) AND (UPPER(:PARM_STAT_TYPE_DESC) IS NULL OR (UPPER(:PARM_STAT_TYPE_DESC) IS NOT NULL AND UPPER(ST.STAT_TYPE_DESC) IN (UPPER(:PARM_STAT_TYPE_DESC)))) AND (:PARM_OWNER IS NULL OR( :PARM_OWNER IS NOT NULL AND VMH.OWNER = (:PARM_OWNER))) AND (:PARM_CONTRACTOR IS NULL OR (:PARM_CONTRACTOR IS NOT NULL AND M.ORG_ID = (:PARM_CONTRACTOR))) AND (:PARM_ACTION_TYPE_id IS NULL OR (:PARM_ACTION_TYPE_id IS NOT NULL AND Ah.ACTION_TYPE_id IN (:PARM_ACTION_TYPE_id))) AND (:P_ACTION_HIST_ID IS NULL OR (:P_ACTION_HIST_ID IS NOT NULL AND :P_ACTION_HIST_ID = AH.ACTION_HIST_ID)) AND (:P_METH_ID IS NULL OR (:P_METH_ID IS NOT NULL AND :P_METH_ID = AH.METH_ID)) AND VMH.CNTY_ID = C.CNTY_ID AND TRUNC(NVL(VMH.COMPLNT_RECVD_DT,SYSDATE)) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL(:PARM_RECVD_START_DT,TO_DATE('01-JAN-1800', 'DD-MON-YYYY'))) AND TRUNC(NVL(:PARM_RECVD_END_DT,SYSDATE)) AND TRUNC(NVL(VMH.COMPLNT_REFERRED_DT,SYSDATE)) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL(:PARM_REFERRED_START_DT,TO_DATE('01-JAN-1800', 'DD-MON-YYYY'))) AND TRUNC(NVL(:PARM_REFERRED_END_DT,SYSDATE)) ;

function.name: cf_owner_nameformula
cf_contractor_nameformula
cf_actionformula
beforepform

report.webSource:
<%@ taglib uri="/WEB-INF/lib/reports_tld.jar" prefix="rw" %> <%@ page language="java" import="java.io.*" errorPage="/rwerror.jsp" session="false" %> <%@ page contentType="text/html;charset=ISO-8859-1" %> <!-- <rw:report id="report"> <rw:objects id="objects"> </rw:objects> -->
<html>
<head> <meta name="GENERATOR" content="Oracle 11gR1 Reports Developer"/> <title> Your Title </title>
<rw:style id="yourStyle"> <!-- Report Wizard inserts style link clause here --> </rw:style>
</head>
<body>
<rw:dataArea id="yourDataArea"> <!-- Report Wizard inserts the default jsp here --> </rw:dataArea>
</body> </html>
<!-- </rw:report> -->
